name: libxml-namespacesupport-perl
title: libxml-namespacesupport-perl
summary: Perl module for supporting simple generic namespaces
description:
Perl module for supporting simple generic namespaces
XML::NamespaceSupport offers a simple way to process namespace-based XML
names. It also helps maintain a prefix-to-namespace URI map and provides a
number of basic checks.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libxml-namespacesupport-perl because Perl module for supporting simple generic namespaces.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libxml-namespacesupport-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libxml-namespacesupport-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libxml-namespacesupport-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
